title: Generating a Recursive SQL Query
scenario: Write a recursive Common Table Expression (CTE) SQL query that retrieves all employees in a company, including their managers, managers' managers, and so on, up to a maximum depth of 5 levels. The query should use a specific schema and table structure.
constraints: Must use a CTE to solve the problem
Must be able to handle employees with no manager
Must be able to handle the maximum depth constraint

evaluationCriteria.description: The SQL query is syntactically correct and uses proper SQL syntax.
The query is optimized for performance and does not result in an infinite loop.
The query correctly retrieves all employees and their managers up to the specified depth.
